_doc: Daily Anthropic Routine call budget (hard cap 15/day per Anthropic limit). Tiers gate routine calls by priority — essential calls never starve.

P0_essential._doc: Daily learning pipeline — never starve. Senior PM round 1 + Challenger + revise = 3 calls/day. 1 buffer for re-tries on transient timeout.

P1_important._doc: Weekly retro (3 calls Sundays) + occasional exit-monitor legacy fallback. Run rarely; budget covers worst-case Sunday plus 2 ad-hoc.

P2_optional._doc: Curators (Reddit, Crypto). Fail-soft if budget exhausted — pipeline already uses heuristic fallback when LLM unavailable. v3.8.8: tightened from 5 → 4 to leave headroom for P0 3-round dialog when Anthropic 24h rolling window is tight.

_notes: Caps sum to 13 (= daily_limit 15 - buffer 2). v3.8.8 reduced P2_optional 5 → 4 + buffer 1 → 2 because chronic 429 on daily-learning Challenger/Revise rounds across 3 days indicated curator weekend volume was eating P0 budget headroom.
P0 has highest priority — even if P1/P2 are exhausted, P0 calls still go through up to its cap.
When tier cap reached, callers receive (False, reason) and fall back to deterministic / heuristic paths.
Reset is automatic at UTC midnight (counts keyed by ISO date).
